_meta.citation: AMRT-07 invariant: sum of principal_paid across schedule.payments per cell == loan.principal exactly. Verified at fixture-authoring time across all 3 cells (rate in {0.05, 0.065, 0.08}). Rate-shock per-cell schedules inherit Phase 3 D-04 final-payment-adjustment so the principal sum is exact-to-cent.

notes: AMRT-07 carry-through: each per-cell build_schedule call (driven by rate_shock's loan.model_copy(update={'annual_rate': rate})) preserves the Phase 3 invariant 'sum(payment.principal) == loan.principal' exactly. Engine-emitted monthly_pi values pinned per cell.
